programme.title: Dirty Dollars Inc.
programme.desc: Organized crime earns $870B yearly, exploiting migrants through dangerous smuggling routes.

programme.title: Dirty Dollars Inc.
programme.desc: Arms trafficking fuels $870B crime market; weapons from legal trade lack transparency.

programme.title: Dirty Dollars Inc.
programme.desc: Organized crime earns ~$870B yearly; fake medicines exploit gaps, causing 700k deaths.

programme.title: The Krays: Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Discover the truth about Ronnie and Reggie Kray, the violent London gangsters of the 1950s and 60s.

programme.title: Gangster Number 1 : The Freddie Foreman Story
programme.desc: In this documentary, Freddie Foreman reveals the details of all the crimes that made him "Gangster No.1".

programme.title: Crisis in Cocaine Valley
programme.desc: A documentary crew gains rare access to Peru's Cocaine Valley, once a major drug zone, now near collapse.

programme.title: Pablo Escobar - The Columbian Cartel King
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar, born in 1949, was raised in urban poverty in Medellin, Colombia.

programme.title: If You Kill, Call Me
programme.desc: Drug trafficking fuels global violence, narco culture, and shapes borders, law, and legal defense.

programme.title: Sugar Wars
programme.desc: This documentary tells the story of Angelo Lonardo and the Cleveland Mafia in which he was part of.

programme.title: The Boneyard
programme.desc: A group of zombie children caused chaos in a coroner's building, necessitating the intervention of a psychic

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: Transgender teenager Mercedes Williamson is murdered by her boyfriend.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: In Mississippi, a black man is murdered in a hate crime perpetrated by a group of white teenagers.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: A man breaks into the apartment of a married couple and opens fire while wearing a camera.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid in two cases: Daigle's pool hall vanishing and NJ teen's suspect-linked disappearance.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid NJ and New Orleans murder cases, revealing truths and clearing key suspects.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help solve IL teen's abduction, NJ serial stabbings, aiding in tracking the killers.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics aid CA mom's murder case, NJ mom tracks kids taken by ex who evades psychic visions.

programme.title: Escape From Death Row
programme.desc: In late 1983, a group of inmates slated for death launched the elaborate scheme that would set them free.

programme.title: Jack the Ripper: The Case Reopened
programme.desc: A documentary which casts new light on the Jack the Ripper case.

programme.desc: In Florida, a young man is accused of the race-hate killing of a teenage Hispanic immigrant.

programme.title: Love and Hate Crime
programme.desc: A father denies a series of honor killings linked to his daughter.

programme.desc: Psychics aid in OK flood child loss and NY double murder, warning the killer may strike again.

programme.desc: Psychics help solve two mom disappearances in OR and CA, guiding police toward justice.

programme.desc: Psychics aid NY couple's shooting, missing OH mom case, guiding police with crucial clues.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Psychics help AR and CA families find missing sons, offering hope as time runs out.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: Mark David Chapman, a disgruntled security guard, becomes obsessed with "The Catcher in the Rye"

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Brian Thompson's murder by a CEO sparks debate, revealing power, ambition, and a shocking manifesto.

programme.desc: This investigation explores the life and career of John F. Kennedy, examining his assassination
